input.content: You are a visual assistant. The image has pixel coordinates starting at (0, 0) in the top-left corner. Use the click tool to click on the center of the specified colored circle. You must pass a single integer for x and a single integer for y. Do NOT use lists, arrays, or bounding box coordinates.

content.text: This is a 1000x1000 pixel image. It shows a blue circle, a yellow circle, a cyan circle, and a orange circle. Click on the orange circle.

tools.name: click

x.description: X pixel coordinate (single integer, not a list)
